# Discharge Injunction - Section 524 Protection [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> The discharge injunction permanently bars creditors from collecting discharged debts. Learn your rights and how to enforce. 2026 guide.

## About
dischargeinjunction.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Filing a Contempt Motion for Discharge Violations - Discharge Injunction: https://dischargeinjunction.com/contempt.html
- Discharged Debt Still on Your Credit Report - How to Dispute - Discharge Injunction: https://dischargeinjunction.com/credit-report-dispute.html
- Discharged Debts on Your Credit Report - Discharge Injunction: https://dischargeinjunction.com/credit-reporting.html
- Debt Collector Calling After Bankruptcy Discharge - Your Rights - Discharge Injunction: https://dischargeinjunction.com/debt-collector.html
- Employer Discrimination After Bankruptcy - Section 525 - Discharge Injunction: https://dischargeinjunction.com/employer-discrimination.html
- Discharge Injunction - Section 524 Protection: https://dischargeinjunction.com/
- What Does the Bankruptcy Discharge Actually Cover? - Discharge Injunction: https://dischargeinjunction.com/scope-of-discharge.html
- Is There a Statute of Limitations on Discharge Injunction Violations?: https://dischargeinjunction.com/statute-of-limitations.html
- Creditor Violating Your Discharge? What to Do - Discharge Injunction: https://dischargeinjunction.com/violations.html
- What the Discharge Injunction Does NOT Cover: https://dischargeinjunction.com/what-is-not-covered.html
- Privacy Policy: https://dischargeinjunction.com/privacy.html
